subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Bear thou witness unto that which God Himself hath testified ere the creation of earth and heaven: that there is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان اشهدی بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و الارض انه لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for women
